title: Patch<T> Serialize: Keep branch comment is defensive noise
description: The Keep arm in Serialize has a 2-line comment explaining why it falls back to null. This comment documents a footgun rather than removing it. The cleaner fix is a debug_assert!(false, "Patch::Keep must not be serialized directly") in the Keep arm so the misuse fails loudly in tests while the fallback still compiles in release. Removes the need for the apologetic comment.
